babysBreath.name: Baby's Breath
babysBreath.description: Early-blooming plants are covered with doubled flowers. Lovely fresh or dried. Perennial, zones 4-8

calendulaPBB.name: Calendula
calendulaPBB.description: So many uses, it's like growing gold in your garden! Edible, pollinator-attracting flowers bloom for months and make long-lasting cut flowers.

catnip.name: Catnip
catnip.description: Cats love to smell and rub leaves. Sew dried leaves into cat toys. Perennial, zones 4-9.

canterburyBells.name: Canterbury Bells
canterburyBells.description: Striking plants with unsual flowers in a blend of four vibrant colors. Biennial.

coreopsisPC.name: Coreopsis
coreopsisPC.description: This prairie wildflower sports sunny yellow blooms with mahogany centers that call out to pollinators. Blooms and delicate foilage bring movement to beds and bouquets.

cosmosBLMC.name: Cosmos
cosmosBLMC.description: Easy to grow and brightly colored mix of early-flowering, semi-double blooms in yellow and orange.

feverfew.name: Feverfew
feverfew.description: Charming clusters of small, daisy shaped flowers on aromatic, bushy plants. Long-blooming, easy to grow and a lovely cut flower.

lemonBalm.name: Lemon Balm
lemonBalm.description: Lemon scented leaves and sprigs used for tea or flavoring cool drinks. Perennial, zones 4-10.

loveInAMist.name: Love-In-A-Mist
loveInAMist.description: Delightful flowers float atop a mist of lacy foilage. The dried seed pods are papery and quite unusual. Great cut flower. Drought tolerant.

pansySGB.name: Pansy
pansySGB.description: Fantastic 2-2.5 inch blooms in a rainbow of colors. These cheerful, edible flowers are one of teh first in spring and last in fall. Add to a bouquet!

snapdragon.name: Snapdragon
snapdragon.description: Vibrant mixture in a wide range of colors. Great in beds, borders, and for cutting.

sunflower.name: Sunflower
sunflower.description: Golden yellow, fully double 6 inch blooms great for mid borders, containers and bouquets.

sweetPeaB.name: Sweet Pea
sweetPeaB.description: A luxurious sweet pea, this highly-perfumed Spencer-type beauty brings dramatic color and large, ruffled flowers to the garden and cut-flower bouquets.

sweetPeaHS.name: Sweet Pea
sweetPeaHS.description: The most intensely fragrant sweet pea! Perfume your garden and floral bouquets with intoxicating aromas of these lovely ruffled blossoms.
